title: Mikebom SPDX Annotation Comment Envelope (v1)
description: JSON payload that mikebom places inside SPDX 2.3 annotations[].comment to losslessly preserve mikebom-specific data that has no native SPDX 2.3 home. Consumers that ignore SPDX annotations see clean SPDX; consumers that read them recover full mikebom fidelity. See specs/010-spdx-output-support/contracts/sbom-format-mapping.md for the per-field placement contract.

schema.description: Versioned schema identifier. Always 'mikebom-annotation/v1' for this revision. Future schema revisions MUST bump this string and SHOULD remain readable by old consumers via duck-typing on the 'field' / 'value' pair.

field.description: The originating mikebom field identifier as it appears in CycloneDX. Examples: 'mikebom:evidence-kind', 'mikebom:shade-relocation', 'evidence.identity', 'evidence.occurrences', 'compositions', 'mikebom:trace-integrity-events-dropped'. The exact set of valid identifiers is enumerated in the data-placement map (sbom-format-mapping.md, Sections C / D / E).

value.description: The field value, JSON-typed. Free-form: may be a string, number, boolean, object, or array. The shape mirrors what the same field carries in CycloneDX. Consumers should treat the value as opaque unless they know the field's schema.
